A 34-year-old man, Jamal Washington, was arrested after a physical altercation with a neighbor, Michael Chen, over a claimed parking space on Elm Street. The dispute turned violent when Washington pushed Chen, leading to a police arrest and a battery charge against Washington. He was released on $2,500 bail. The incident highlights rising parking tensions in the area due to new apartment developments.
